text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning, I bump into Yaeno Muteki looking
slightly dazed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm truly sorry. I went to bed at the regular time
last night, but...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, when I closed my eyes, my mind
began revisiting all the races and martial arts
matches I've had, one after the other...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And so, I simply lay there wide awake, heart
pounding. This was a great misstep, I know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Yaeno Muteki struggled to get
much rest.
